name: InterfaceAttribute
summary: Attribute that declares a plugin implements a particular interface or behaviours.

constructors.name: InterfaceAttribute(string, string)
constructors.summary: Attribute that declares a plugin implements particular interface or behaviour. The combination of Name and DeveloperId is used to form an Id that identifies which interface is being supported.

params.name: developerId
params.doc: The 4 character ADN developer code or a GUID.

properties.name: DeveloperId
properties.summary: The 4 character ADN developer code or a GUID. The combination of this and Name is used to form and Id that identifies which interface is being supported.

properties.name: DisplayName
properties.summary: Optional additional information about the interface implementation

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: The name of the Inteface. The combination of this and DeveloperId is used to form an Id that identifies which interface is being supported.

properties.name: UserData
properties.summary: Optional additional information about the interface implementation
